data.title: Trump hints at possibly extending TikTok ban deadline
data.description:
On Thursday, Trump suggested that he may extend TikTok’s sale or ban deadline if a deal for the China-owned app isn’t reached within the 75-day negotiation period ending on 5th April.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-hints-extending-tiktok-deadline/

data.title: Bitcoin and four other currencies may be considered for inclusion in the US strategic reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Reuters: Bitcoin and four other currencies may be considered for inclusion in the US strategic reserves

data.title: IntoTheBlock: Over $500 million in ETH was withdrawn from exchanges this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to IntoTheBlock data, more than $500 million in ETH flowed out of exchanges this week, indicating that ETH traders are still actively accumulating and market buying sentiment is strong.

data.title: SlowMist: 1inch old version of Fusion contract vulnerability caused losses of more than $5 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On March 5, the 1inch team discovered a vulnerability in its old version of the Fusion v1 parser smart contract. According to the analysis of the SlowMist Security Team, the incident caused a loss of about 2.4 million USDC and 1,276 WETH, totaling more than 5 million US dollars.
The official confirmed that the vulnerability did not affect the funds of end users, and the only affected object was the parser contract using Fusion v1. 1inch has taken measures and is continuing to follow up on the security situation.

data.title: Binance Places GoPlus Security (GPS) Under Monitoring Tag Due to Market Irregularities
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance has extended its Monitoring Tag to GoPlus Security (GPS) due to suspicious market-making behavior following its spot listing.A market maker offloaded 70 million GPS tokens between March 4 and March 5, 2025, while placing no buy orders, causing a significant price drop.The market maker earned approximately 5 million USDT, raising concerns about manipulative trading practices.Binance has temporarily suspended the market maker’s account and is conducting a follow-up investigation.GPS traders must now pass a risk quiz every 90 days to continue trading it on Binance Spot and Binance Margin.Why GPS Was Added to Binance’s Monitoring Tag ListBinance has flagged GoPlus Security (GPS) under its Monitoring Tag system, signaling higher volatility and risk for the token. The decision follows concerns over a mass sell-off by a market maker, who offloaded 70 million GPS tokens immediately after trading opened.Key irregularities include:The market maker placed no buy orders while aggressively selling GPS tokens.Continuous selling pressure led to a sharp decline in GPS price.The market maker’s Binance account has been suspended pending an investigation.“Tokens with the Monitoring Tag exhibit notably higher volatility and risks. These tokens are closely monitored and could be delisted if they fail to meet our listing criteria,” Binance stated in its announcement.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based ELX and ROAM perpetual contracts, with leverage ranging from 1 to 20 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based ELX and ROAM perpetual contracts with a maximum leverage of 20 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: 1inch Faces Security Breach with Estimated $1 Million Loss
data.description: According to Odaily, on March 5, the SlowMist security team detected suspicious transactions related to 1inch, with preliminary estimates indicating a loss of approximately $1 million. Previously, 1inch had disclosed that on March 5, the team discovered a vulnerability in the old Fusion v1 parser smart contract, which resulted in financial losses. The security team is currently addressing the associated risks.

data.title: Binance News: Binance to Cease Support for Deposits and Withdrawals on Selected Networks from March 14, 2025
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance will stop supporting deposits and withdrawals for specific tokens on certain networks starting March 14, 2025, at 08:00 UTC.Affected tokens and networks:Cortex (CTXC) via Ethereum NetworkNULS (NULS) via BNB Smart ChainUniLend (UFT) via BNB Smart ChainUsers can still transact these tokens via alternative supported networks on Binance.Deposits sent via the affected networks after the deadline will not be credited and may result in asset loss.Binance to Remove Support for Certain Network Deposits & WithdrawalsBinance has announced that it will discontinue support for deposits and withdrawals of Cortex (CTXC), NULS (NULS), and UniLend (UFT) on specific blockchain networks.The change will take effect on March 14, 2025, at 08:00 UTC, after which any deposits made via the affected networks will not be credited.Users must withdraw or transfer assets via supported networks before the deadline to avoid potential asset loss.Tokens & Networks Affected:TokenAffected NetworkAlternative Supported NetworksCortex (CTXC)Ethereum NetworkOther supported networks on BinanceNULS (NULS)BNB Smart Chain (BSC)Other supported networks on BinanceUniLend (UFT)BNB Smart Chain (BSC)Other supported networks on BinanceWhile Binance has not provided a reason for the delisting of these networks, it may be due to low transaction volumes, network efficiency issues, or compliance factors.What Users Should Do:- Withdraw or transfer assets from the affected networks before March 14, 2025.- Use alternative networks that Binance supports for these tokens.- Stay updated on Binance announcements regarding network support changes.

data.title: Gate.io launches ELX perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io has launched ELX perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 18:00 (UTC+8) on March 7, 2025, supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: BNB Ecosystem Project 1Piece (OnePiece) Completes Fair Minting in 2 Hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, 1Piece (OnePiece) completed fair and public casting on BNB Chain today. The original planned casting period was 3 to 5 days, but the casting was completed in less than 2 hours after the project went online. It is reported that the total amount of 1Piece is 100 billion, and all tokens are publicly and fairly launched and cast.
